valueProposition.headline: Identity verification is not enough.
valueProposition.extendedSubheadline: Issue, verify, and govern credentials—built for EUDI Wallets, Open Badges, and enterprise trust.

idvComparison.title: From IDV to Verifiable Identity
idvComparison.takeaway: ElevenID LLC replaces repeated verification with reusable trust.

eudiOpenBadges.title: Built for EUDI Wallets and Verifiable Credentials
eudiOpenBadges.quote: IDV platforms stop at a one-time decision. ElevenID LLC produces cryptographically verifiable outcomes that can be reused across wallets, ecosystems, and trust registries.

organizationOutcomes.title: Why This Matters for Organizations
organizationOutcomes.reduceKYC: Reduce repeat KYC costs with reusable credentials
organizationOutcomes.avoidLockIn: Avoid vendor lock-in with open standards
organizationOutcomes.supportBadges: Support Open Badges, workforce credentials, and government IDs in one system

audienceRouting.title: Choose Your Path
audienceRouting.subtitle: Pick your entry point—enterprise, government, or developers.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Reduce repeat KYC, enable partner interoperability, and govern trust at scale.

government.title: Government
government.description: EUDI-ready infrastructure for ISO credentials, trust lists, and regulated acceptance.

developers.title: Developers
developers.description: Docs, SDKs, and quickstarts for VC issuance and verification.

issuance.title: Issuance
issuance.description: Issue standards-based credentials with cryptographic signatures and policy enforcement.

verification.title: Verification
verification.description: Verify credentials against trust anchors with revocation checking and selective disclosure.

governance.title: Governance
governance.description: Manage trust, policy, and deployment centrally—without changing verifier code.

identityProblem.title: The Identity Problem
identityProblem.description: Most organizations face fragmented systems, unclear trust, and growing compliance pressure.

items.fragmented: Fragmented identity systems that don't interoperate
items.unclearTrust: Unclear issuer trust across partners and jurisdictions
items.privacyPressure: Privacy compliance pressure (data minimization + selective disclosure)

solvesIt.title: How ElevenID LLC Solves It
solvesIt.intro: Govern identity with four primitives: trust profiles, credential templates, presentation policies, and flows.
solvesIt.subheading: Policies are configuration, not code. Endpoints execute centrally governed trust and disclosure rules without redeployment.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Digital identity is a governed exchange between four actors.

standards.title: Standards-Based Architecture
standards.subtitle: Standards are not integrations. They are the product.
standards.description: These layers let ElevenID LLC interoperate across governments, wallets, and enterprises without custom integrations.

startFirst.title: What are you doing first?
startFirst.description: Choose a starting point. You can expand into a full ecosystem when you're ready.

verify.title: Verify credentials
verify.description: Verify EUDI wallets, Open Badges, and ISO credentials.

issue.title: Issue credentials
issue.description: Issue workforce, education, or government credentials.

offline.title: Offline / facility
offline.description: Verify at checkpoints with limited connectivity.

wallet.title: Wallet experience
wallet.description: Give users a wallet to hold and present credentials.

products.title: Products & Capabilities
products.description: A complete platform—from issuance to verification and governance.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.item5: Built with AI-assisted development workflows to maintain high quality at lower cost.

portals.message: for applicants, vendors, and admins—manage API keys, trust policies, and operations in one place.

footer.title: Ready to get started?
